data.title: Mini Clips
Pocket Mirror
DIY Custom Clip Set
data.description: Make your own claw clip set: This is a perfect activity to do alone or with friends! The set comes with the following items: 6 Clips of your choice 6 Tweezers 3 Glue Packs 1 Box of multicoloured crystalsADD CLAW CLIP COLOUR CHOICES IN NOTE SECTION- (if not added we will add a random mix)
data.description_ar:
اصنع مجموعة الشباصات الخاصة بك: هذا نشاط مثالي للقيام به بمفردك أو مع الأصدقاء! تأتي المجموعة مع العناصر التالية: 
 6 مقاطع من اختيارك 6 ملاقط 3 عبوات غراء 1 علبة كريستالات متعددة الألوان
data.description_style:
Make your own claw clip set: This is a perfect activity to do alone or with friends! The set comes with the following items:

  • 6 Clips of your choice
  • 6 Tweezers
  • 3 Glue Packs
  • 1 Box of multicoloured crystals
ADD CLAW CLIP COLOUR CHOICES IN NOTE SECTION- (if not added we will add a random mix)
data.description_ar_style:
اصنع مجموعة الشباصات الخاصة بك: هذا نشاط مثالي للقيام به بمفردك أو مع الأصدقاء! تأتي المجموعة مع العناصر التالية:


6 مقاطع من اختيارك

6 ملاقط

3 عبوات غراء

1 علبة كريستالات متعددة الألوان

data.title: Sugar Glaze Brush
data.description:
Add to WishlistThis pure bamboo brush is a plastic-free and high quality zero-waste alternative to your ordinary hair brush. Designed to glide through your hair smoothly, while teasing natural oils along each strand, this brush gives your hair a significantly shinier and healthier appearance and feel.Includes a ventilation hole to aid in drainage after the brush has been washed Organic bamboo handle & bristles with biodegradable acetate back Due to hygienic reasons this item is finale sale. We are unable to accept any returns Slight variations in color may occur
 
 Choose whether you would like your brush plain, printed, with glitter or crystals. Then add your choice of name to the comments.
data.description_ar: Choose whether you would like your brush plain, printed, with glitter or crystals. Then add your choice of name to the comments.
data.description_style:
This pure bamboo brush is a plastic-free and high quality zero-waste alternative to your ordinary hair brush. Designed to glide through your hair smoothly, while teasing natural oils along each strand, this brush gives your hair a significantly shinier and healthier appearance and feel.
  • Includes a ventilation hole to aid in drainage after the brush has been washed
  • Organic bamboo handle & bristles with biodegradable acetate back
  • Due to hygienic reasons this item is finale sale. We are unable to accept any returns
  • Slight variations in color may occur



Choose whether you would like your brush plain, printed, with glitter or crystals. Then add your choice of name to the comments.
